policy.selection: all 406 local release/API HTML pages, not high-value filtering
policy.discovery: Uses the local site/ completed subset plus full_site/release and full_site/api HTML files as the stable inventory source; official release toctree and API Doxygen assets are only used as title/source hints.
policy.completion: Existing curated bilingual pages and manifest-promoted full_site pages are marked bilingual_complete; every other discovered official page is pending_full_scope until generated and validated.
policy.local_output_plan: Draft full-scope release docs go under full_site/release/ and API docs go under full_site/api/ unless already mapped to an existing completed local bilingual page.
